name: saas-eval-basic
description: Core SQL capability coverage for SaaS business metrics dataset

cases.question: How many rows are in the dataset?
What is the total revenue across all rows?
What is the average revenue per row?
What are the minimum and maximum revenue values in the dataset?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(revenue) AS min_revenue, MAX(revenue) AS max_revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: How many rows have country equal to 'India'?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE country = 'India'

cases.question: What is the total revenue generated by Enterprise plan customers?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE plan = 'Enterprise'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE churned = true

cases.question: What is the total revenue for records with dates in March 2024?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE date BETWEEN '2024-03-01' AND '2024-03-31'

cases.question: What is the total revenue broken down by country?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT country, ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) AS sum_revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY country ORDER BY sum_revenue DESC

cases.question: What is the average number of users for each plan?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT plan, ROUND(AVG(users)::numeric, 2) AS avg_users FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY plan ORDER BY plan

cases.question: Which 3 rows have the highest revenue? Return all columns ordered by revenue descending.

expect.gold_sql: SELECT date, country, plan, users, revenue, churned FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3

cases.question: What is the best way to reduce customer churn in a SaaS business?
